headline: TPYP: Examining The Structure And Suitability Of This Pipeline ETF

headline: 3 Large Energy Dividend Stocks to Ride Out Oil Price Swings
summary: CVX, KMI, TRP stand out as dividend-heavy energy giants, offering stability and steady income as oil prices swing amid supply disruptions.

headline: White House to pay TotalEnergies $1 billion to kill off East Coast wind farm projects
summary: The announcement comes as the Iran war disrupts global oil and gas supplies, making the U.S.' development of its LNG resources more urgent.
